sourceLabel: Seed-backed atlas with live Bihar discovery and normalization wired underneath
coverageNote: The UI still runs on seeded election facts, but the source layer now has real Bihar bootstrap captures, 4 discovered Assembly cycles, and 38 normalized district rows.
summary: Measured step 1 is complete: Bihar discovery is captured from IndiaVotes and normalized into staging while LokDhaba endpoint behavior is logged for the next adapter pass.
nextStep: Capture Bihar constituency-result surfaces next, then map party and constituency aliases before materializing canonical staging tables.
